supervisor.name: CTO/Supervisor
responsibilities: Read mandatory memory files before work starts
Create task ids and route tasks to workers
Keep logs, reports, state and handover current
Apply Telegram output guard and deploy risk gates

workers.name: Backend and infrastructure
workers.scope: APIs, data models, local services and backend scripts

workers.name: Frontend and panel
workers.scope: Web panel, UI state screens and operator experience

workers.name: DevOps and deploy
workers.scope: Service files, staging, rollback plans and deployment checks

workers.name: Test and quality
workers.scope: Validation, audit checks, reports and regression coverage
